summary: Added a small entry bridge from Chapter 15 by carrying Gabe's warning into Lena's approach to June, and clarified at the close that only repayment will receive any response so Chapter 17's silence-and-debt aftermath follows directly.
edits: Added a brief opening beat tying Lena's solo visit to Gabe's warning from the prior chapter.
Sharpened the final paragraph so repayment remains the only contact Lena will answer.
